title: Gateway Policy
description: Machine-readable gateway execution policy (DEC-0018 Option A as implemented by DEC-0019; supersedes the DEC-0009 zero-provider constants through the documented contract-migration procedure). The ratified provider-enablement values are pinned as constants: exactly one external provider adapter (anthropic) plus the deterministic offline fake adapter, synthetic data only, the exact ratified model allowlist and USD/token/attempt ceilings, and a mandatory cryptographic binding to the Product Owner-signed provider-policy-candidate (the active policy must embed the signed candidate's canonical content digest and the public approval evidence/receipt references, so any ceiling, model, or data-class drift breaks the binding). Live invocation is NOT granted by this policy: it additionally requires the committed provider-operational-state document (live_invocation_enabled is schema-pinned false in this phase), credential resolution through the approved secret boundary, and a separately authenticated, unconsumed live-call authorization. Relaxing any pinned value requires a superseding decision and a new contract version — never a document edit.

decision_ref.description: the ratified enablement decision this policy encodes (DEC-0018 Option A; implementation record DEC-0019)

allowed_adapters.description: DEC-0018/DEC-0019: the Anthropic raw-HTTPS adapter is the only configured external provider; the deterministic offline Fake Adapter remains for tests and offline runs. Sorted, unique.

allowed_data_classes.description: DEC-0018: synthetic data only; real client data is prohibited from every model path

allowed_execution_tiers.description: tier 0 (deterministic, fake adapter) plus the two ratified model tiers: 1 (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) and 2 (claude-sonnet-5). Sorted, unique.

model_allowlist.description: exact ratified model IDs, sorted by model_id; no aliases, no other IDs, no automatic escalation between them

external_network_allowed.description: network capability exists ONLY inside the gateway Anthropic adapter's pinned raw-HTTPS transport; live invocation is additionally gated on the operational state, the secret boundary, and a signed live-call authorization, none of which exist in this phase

api_credentials_permitted.description: credentials may be resolved ONLY through the approved secret boundary (macOS Keychain, documented service/account); no credential is provisioned in this phase and none may appear in the repository, CI, configuration, or records

max_external_spend_usd_per_month.description: UTC month; the provider-console hard cap at the same value is a later operational ceremony and is NOT claimed configured by this policy

max_attempts_per_request.description: at most two total attempts (one bounded retry of explicitly classified transient failures); every attempt consumes its own budget reservation

provider_policy_candidate_ref.description: artifact_id of the committed provider-policy-candidate this policy activates

provider_policy_candidate_digest.description: canonical content digest of the exact signed candidate (the digest the Product Owner approval evidence binds); CI recomputes it from the committed candidate and verifies the full candidate -> evidence -> authority -> decision -> active-policy chain

provider_enablement_evidence_ref.description: evidence_id of the committed public provider-enablement-approval evidence

provider_enablement_receipt_ref.description: receipt_id of the committed public consumption receipt proving the approval was verified and its nonce consumed exactly once
